description:
Specification

Product Information

Item Code:W2225P166436

Product Type:General Item

Product Name:PawHut 3-Level Cat Tree with Sisal Scratching Posts, Fun Cat Badminton Toy for Playing, Soft Cushions, & Play Areas

Main Color:Natural

Main Material:Particle Board

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):25.50

Assembled Width (in.):17.75

Assembled Height (in.):46.50

Weight (lbs.):23.06

Package Size

Length (in.):28.25

Width (in.):20.75

Height (in.):18.00

Weight (lbs.):28.86

Product Features

  • MULTIFUNCTIONAL CENTER: this cat tree has a spacious hideaway home with plenty of lounging room for your cats to sleep! Furthermore, we have multiple scratching platforms, cushions, and a badminton toy offers endless opportunity to climb, play, and rest for your friends.
  • STURDY & SECURE: super solid construction, a well-balanced design, and a strong base mean that cats can easily leap on or off this cat condo. Solid P2 grade multi-layer board and wood construction keep the whole cat tower sturdy and stable and pet friendly.
  • SOFT CUSHION: this multi-level cat activity tower is composed of quality plush material that is very soft and comfortable. Your furry friends will love the plush touch and enjoy exploring their new home.
  • SAVING YOUR FURNITURE: with scratching posts wrapped with durable natural sisal ropes, this cat tree is perfect for your cats to sharpen their claws, while simultaneously saving your furniture from scratching and digging.
  • CAT TREE DIMENSIONS: Overall Dimension: 25.5" L x 17.75" W x 46.5" H. Recommended for the cats less than 9 lbs.
